title: How the Signet Ring Fell from 'Uthmin 's Hand into the Well of Aris
description: the Well of Ar s It was related to me by Muhammad b. Musa al-Harashi-Abu Khalaf'Abdallah b.'Isa al-Khazzaz, the associate (shank) of Yunis b. 'Ubayd-Dawud b. Abi Hind-'Ikrimah-Ibn'Abbas: The Messenger of God decided to write letters to the non-Arabs (a'djim), summoning them to Almighty God. A certain man said to him, "0 Messenger of God, they will not accept a letter unless it is sealed." So the Messenger of God ordered a signet ring to be

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 15
